title: DARLING in the FRANXX GUI Custom Pack
description: DARLING in the FRANXX GUI Custom Pack
body:
**![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/FOI6SiF.png)**

**Introduction:**
It's GUI ONLY Resource pack so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.

This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "DARLING in the FRANXX" or otherwise known". Don't hesitate to comment down below , I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy.

The palette that I choose is Red & White & Pink but maybe in the future.
If you guys want other colors like Blue & Yellow or any colors else.
please tell me I will think about it!

If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.
**Feature Highlights:**
- **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/zhOlp8U.png)
- **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/YeUS9dY.png)
- **Crafting Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/B9vXH2k.png)
- **Anvil:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/4PUUe0z.png)
- **Loom:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/TmfhPSX.png)
- **Cartography Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/0bi4afz.png)
- **Brewing Stand:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/albyIF6.png)
- **Shulker Box:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/HUUH7py.png)
- **Inventory:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/ouyaJVT.png)
- **Beacon Options:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/kLwvFmV.png)
- **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/tFOoOXX.png)
